title: anoectochilus rotundifolius
intro: Anoectochilus rotundifolius, commonly known as the round leaf orchid or round-leaved hood orchid, is a species of orchid native to China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Anoectochilus rotundifolius include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and cardiovascular conditions. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
